scripts.setup: npm --prefix user install && npm --prefix admin install && npm run prisma:sync && npm run db:generate
scripts.prisma:sync: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "Copy-Item -Path prisma/schema.prisma -Destination user/prisma/schema.prisma -Force; Copy-Item -Path prisma/schema.prisma -Destination admin/prisma/schema.prisma -Force"
scripts.db:generate: npm run prisma:sync && npm --prefix user run prisma:generate && npm --prefix admin run prisma:generate
scripts.db:migrate:create: npm run prisma:sync && npm --prefix admin run migration:create
scripts.db:migrate: npm run prisma:sync && npm --prefix admin run migrate
